hero.sub: Faigh uimhir fóin shlán saor in aisce chun glaonna agus téacsanna a dhéanamh ar fud an domhain thar Wi‑Fi nó sonraí. Bain sult as criptiú deireadh go deireadh, teachtaireachtaí a imíonn, agus glaonna gutha/físe HD — le huirlisí ionsuite a chabhraíonn leat fanacht nasctha thar theorainneacha.

refund.title: Polasaí Aisíocaíochta
refund.intro: Ag Chatforia, déanaimid ár ndícheall seirbhís ardchaighdeáin a sholáthar do gach úsáideoir. Míníonn an Polasaí Aisíocaíochta seo cathain is féidir aisíocaíochtaí a eisiúint.

subscriptions.title: Síntiúis
subscriptions.body: Gearrtar síntiúis roimh ré ar bhonn athfhillteach. Is féidir leat cealú am ar bith trí shocruithe do chuntais nó tríd an ardán a úsáideadh don cheannach.

eligibility.title: Incháilitheacht Aisíocaíochta
eligibility.body: Féadfar aisíocaíochtaí a dheonú i gcás muirir dhúblacha, earráidí billeála, nó fadhbanna teicniúla a chuireann cosc ar rochtain ar ghnéithe íoctha. Déantar gach iarratas a athbhreithniú de réir cáis.

nonRefundable.title: Neamh-inaisíoctha
nonRefundable.body: De ghnáth ní chuirimid aisíocaíochtaí ar fáil d’am neamhúsáidte, tréimhsí páirteacha síntiúis, ná mainneachtain cealú roimh athnuachan.

thirdParty.title: Ceannacháin Tríú Páirtí
thirdParty.body: Má ceannaíodh trí ardáin tríú páirtí cosúil leis an Apple App Store, ní mór aisíocaíochtaí a iarraidh go díreach trí na hardáin sin.

contact.title: Teagmháil
contact.body: tacaíocht@Chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

whyMessaging.title: Why Messaging Platforms Matter tuilleadh Than Ever
whyMessaging.intro: Messaging platforms have become one of the most important tools for communication in today’s world. From personal conversations to business interactions, messaging apps allow people to stay connected instantly and efficiently.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: People rely ar siúl messaging apps for daily communication with friends, teaghlach, and colleagues. Whether it's a quick update or a long conversation, messaging provides a convenient and flexible way to stay in touch.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: One of the main advantages of messaging platforms is their speed. teachtaireachtaí are delivered instantly, allowing users to communicate in real time. This level of convenience has made messaging the preferred method of communication for many people.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Messaging platforms connect people across the globe. With internet access, users can communicate regardless of location, making it easier to build relationships and collaborate internationally.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Modern messaging platforms focus ar siúl giving users control over their sonraí and conversations. Features like criptiú, príobháideachas socruithe, and teachtaireacht controls allow users to communicate with confidence.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Messaging continues to evolve with nua features such as AI-powered responses, aistriúchán, and multimedia sharing. As technology advances, messaging platforms will become even tuilleadh powerful and versatile.
whyMessaging.outro: Chatforia is built with these principles in mind, offering a fast, secure, and user-friendly messaging experience for a connected world.

global.title: The Future of Global Communication
global.intro: Communication has evolved rapidly over the past few decades. What once riachtanach phone glaonna or in-person meetings can now be done quickly through messaging platforms. As technology continues to advance, global communication is becoming faster, tuilleadh accessible, and tuilleadh inclusive.
global.barriersDesc: One of the biggest changes in communication is the reduction of geographic barriers. People can now connect with others across the world in near real time. Whether for personal conversations, business, or collaboration, messaging platforms have made distance far níos lú limiting.
global.translationDesc: teanga has traditionally been one of the biggest obstacles to global communication. Today, built-in aistriúchán tools cabhair bridge that gap. Platforms like Chatforia allow users to communicate tuilleadh easily even if they speak different languages, creating nua opportunities for connection and understanding.
global.realtimeDesc: Speed is a eochair factor shaping modern communication. Users expect teachtaireachtaí to be delivered quickly, and modern infrastructure supports that expectation. Real-time messaging enables tuilleadh natural and fluid conversations.
global.privacyDesc: As communication becomes tuilleadh digital, príobháideachas and slándáil are increasingly important. Users want confidence that their conversations are protected. Features like criptiú and user-controlled socruithe cabhair tacaíocht a tuilleadh secure communication experience.
global.futureDesc: The future of global communication will likely include tuilleadh advanced tools, such as AI-assisted messaging, improved aistriúchán, and enhanced user experiences. As technology evolves, communication will continue to become tuilleadh intuitive and accessible.
global.outro: Platforms like Chatforia are part of this shift, helping people connect tuilleadh easily across languages and borders.

index.title: Blag Chatforia
index.intro: Fiosraigh léargais ar chumarsáid, sábháilteacht ar líne, agus conas atá teicneolaíocht teachtaireachtaí ag nascadh daoine ar fud an domhain.
index.post1: Conas comhrá a dhéanamh go sábháilte ar líne
index.post3: Cén fáth a bhfuil ardáin teachtaireachtaí tábhachtach

howItWorks.title: Conas a oibríonn Chatforia
howItWorks.intro: Tá Chatforia deartha chun cumarsáid a dhéanamh simplí, tapa agus inrochtana. Ní thógann sé ach cúpla céim tosú.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Cláraigh le do ríomhphost nó ainm úsáideora chun do chuntas Chatforia a chruthú.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Ceangail le daoine eile trí theagmhálaithe a roghnú nó comhráite nua a thosú.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Seachadtar teachtaireachtaí go tapa chun eispéireas cumarsáide réidh a sholáthar.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Cabhraíonn aistriúchán ionsuite le húsáideoirí cumarsáid a dhéanamh thar theangacha éagsúla.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Bainistigh do roghanna, teagmhálaithe agus socruithe cumarsáide.

safety.title: Sábháilteacht & Treoirlínte Pobail
safety.intro: Tá Chatforia tiomanta do thimpeallacht shábháilte agus ómósach a choinneáil do gach úsáideoir. Cabhraíonn na treoirlínte seo le heispéireas dearfach a chinntiú do chách.
safety.respectDesc: Táthar ag súil go ndéanfaidh úsáideoirí cumarsáid go hómósach. Ní cheadaítear ciapadh, mí-úsáid ná iompar díobhálach.

tools.block: Blocáil úsáideoirí chun tuilleadh idirghníomhaíochta a chosc

safety.enforcementDesc: Féadfaimid gníomh a dhéanamh i gcoinne cuntas a sháraíonn na treoirlínte seo, lena n-áirítear rabhaidh, srianta nó baint bhuan den ardán.

profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Forward isteach glaonna and texts to your verified phone or ríomhphost. amach glaonna/texts can show your Chatforia uimhir.
profile.errSmsDest: Roghnaigh at least one destination (phone or ríomhphost).
profile.errQuietHours: Quiet hours must be between 0 and 23.
profile.ageBandHint: We only store an age range (not your exact date of birth). This is used to keep Random Chat pairings reasonable.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Use age-based matching in Random Chat
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: When ar siúl, we try to pair you with people in compatible age ranges.
profile.partnerAgeBands: Who can you be matched with?
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Teens are always matched only with other teens. Adults cannot be matched with teens.
profile.teenMatchingNote: For safety, accounts in the 13–17 age range can only be matched with other 13–17 accounts in Random Chat.
profile.foriaRemember: Let Ria remember things you tell it
profile.foriaRememberDesc: When this is ar siúl, Foria can use your past Random Chat conversations (just with you) to keep the conversation flowing. You can turn this as any time.
profile.voicemailForwardEmailPlaceholder: ríomhphost to seol glórphost notifications to
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Used when your audio greeting is unavailable.
profile.voicemailNote: Voicemails from your Chatforia numbers will be stored in your glórphost inbox. You can cumasaigh transcription and forwarding in supported pleananna.
profile.portHint: Want to keep your reatha uimhir? You can port it into Chatforia Wireless.

join.success: You have joined this teaghlach. You now share their sonraí pool.
join.error: We could not add you to this teaghlach. The tabhair cuireadh may be invalid or expired.

premium.heading: Téigh Préimh
premium.description: Díghlasáil gnéithe cumhachtacha agus bain fógraí.

upgrade.title: Uasghrádú
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Tosaigh with our saor in aisce, ad-supported plean. Go ad-saor in aisce with Plus, or unlock full power features with préimh.
upgrade.subtitle: Roghnaigh an app plean, add sonraí packs for yourself, or share sonraí with your teaghlach — gach from one place.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Tosaigh with our saor in aisce, ad-supported plean. Go ad-saor in aisce with Plus, or unlock full power features with préimh.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Add global eSIM sonraí so Chatforia keeps working even when you’re away from Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Cruthaigh a roinnte sonraí pool for your teaghlach and bainistigh everyone’s úsáid from one place.
upgrade.benefitsLine: Díghlasáil gnéithe cumhachtacha agus bain fógraí.

scheduleBanner.title: síntiús will end

auth.continue: Lean ar aghaidh chuig logáil isteach

free.title: Saor in aisce
free.desc: Tosaigh messaging for saor in aisce. Ideal if you’re just trying Chatforia.

features.chat: Real-time 1:1 and group chat, plus voice and video glaonna
features.media: Share photos, voice teachtaireachtaí, and short videos
features.ai: AI-powered smart replies and instant aistriúchán (fair use)
features.disappearing: Disappearing teachtaireachtaí and basic príobháideachas controls
features.ads: saor in aisce forever with ads in the app

plus.title: Plus
plus.desc: gach the essentials, without ads. Great for everyday messaging and calling.

features.allFree: Everything in saor in aisce, with níl ads
features.forwarding: Forward glaonna and texts to your real uimhir fóin
features.support: Faster tacaíocht when something goes wrong

premiumMonthly.title: préimh (Monthly)
premiumMonthly.desc: The full Chatforia experience: AI power tools, customization, and priority tacaíocht.

features.themes: Unlock gach préimh color themes and app customizations
features.ai: préimh-only AI power tools for rewrites, smart replies, and summaries
features.support: Priority tacaíocht when you need cabhair most

premiumAnnual.title: préimh (Annual)
premiumAnnual.desc: sábháil tuilleadh when billed yearly — including extra color themes, AI tools, and priority tacaíocht.

features.allPremium: Everything in préimh Monthly — including extra color themes
features.save25: sábháil around 30% compared to paying monthly
features.bestFor: Best for power users, remote workers, and heavy travelers

premiumAnnual.ctaPublic: sábháil 30% with annual – continue to login
premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Billed upfront. cealaigh anytime. níl hidden fees.

marketing.freeDesc: Tosaigh messaging for saor in aisce.
marketing.plusDesc: Most affordable ad-saor in aisce experience.
marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Full features, ringtones, and AI power tools.
marketing.annualDisclaimer: Billed upfront. cealaigh anytime. níl hidden fees.

mobile.title: Chatforia Mobile (eSIM sonraí packs)
mobile.subtitle: Add global sonraí to keep Chatforia working even without Wi-Fi. Prices automatically adjust based ar siúl your country and currency.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Pick a one-time global sonraí pack so Chatforia keeps working when you’re traveling or away from Wi-Fi.
mobile.note: We don’t sell sonraí packs under 3 GB.

features.throttle: Speeds may slow after high úsáid

disclaimer.devices: eSIM sonraí packs require an eSIM-compatible and unlocked gléas. Availability varies by phone model, carrier, and country. Coverage and speeds vary by region.

small.title: Pacáiste tosaithe
small.desc: Includes 3 GB of high-speed sonraí — ideal for light messaging and occasional glaonna.
small.bestFor: Short trips, light messaging, and occasional glaonna

medium.title: Pacáiste taistealaí
medium.desc: Includes 5 GB of high-speed sonraí for trips, commuting, and regular VoIP glaonna.
medium.bestFor: Weekend trips, regular VoIP glaonna, and maps

large.title: Pacáiste cumhachta
large.desc: Includes 10 GB of high-speed sonraí for heavy chat, glaonna, and video ar siúl the Chatforia network.
large.bestFor: Heavy chat, glaonna, video, and hotspot use
large.aria: Buy Power user eSIM sonraí pack

compare.title: Déan comparáid idir pacáistí sonraí eSIM
compare.disclaimer: Actual sonraí úsáid depends ar siúl how you use Chatforia (voice, video, media, and other apps ar siúl your phone).

family.title: Chatforia teaghlach (roinnte sonraí)
family.subtitle: Share a single sonraí pool across your teaghlach. One bill, multiple Chatforia accounts, global coverage.

small.title: Teaghlach Beag
small.desc: Includes 20 GB of roinnte high-speed sonraí — great for 2–3 light users.

medium.title: Teaghlach Meánach
medium.desc: Includes 40 GB of roinnte high-speed sonraí — ideal for 3–5 gníomhach baill.

large.title: Teaghlach Mór
large.desc: Includes 80 GB of roinnte high-speed sonraí — for power families that are always online.

feature.shared: roinnte sonraí pool for your teaghlach
feature.members: tabhair cuireadh up to 4 additional baill
feature.fairUse: Subject to fair-use policy and local limits

family.disclaimer: teaghlach packs cruthaigh or top up a roinnte sonraí pool. You can tabhair cuireadh and remove baill anytime.
family.footnote: teaghlach packs share a single sonraí pool across linked Chatforia accounts. Availability and limits depend ar siúl your country and local regulations.

why.title: Why people switch to Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia gives you a real uimhir fóin, smart aistriúchán, and a clear path to go ad-saor in aisce when you’re ready.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Lighter ads ar siúl saor in aisce, a simple Plus uasghrádaigh when you’re ready, and préimh tools TextNow doesn’t offer.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Modern app, global-first design, and built-in aistriúchán instead of sean-school glao forwarding.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs chat apps
messengers.body: Text real phone numbers — not just other app users — with AI and stádas built in. Great if you’re coming from apps like TextFree or TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Comparison based ar siúl publicly available information and may athraigh over time. Other saor in aisce-texting apps like TextFree or TextMe are generally similar to TextNow.

free.q: Is the saor in aisce plean really saor in aisce?
free.a: tá. The saor in aisce plean includes a Chatforia uimhir, calling, and messaging with ads. You can stay ar siúl saor in aisce as long as you like, or uasghrádaigh to remove ads and unlock tuilleadh features.

plusPremium.q: What’s the difference between Plus and préimh?
plusPremium.a: Plus removes ads and extends your teachtaireacht stair — perfect for everyday use. préimh adds extra customization, AI tools for rewrites and replies, and priority tacaíocht for heavy users.

esim.q: Where do eSIM sonraí packs work?
esim.a: Chatforia Mobile uses global eSIM coverage. Availability depends ar siúl your country and gléas. You’ll see supported options during activation inside the app.

cancel.q: Can I cealaigh or athraigh pleananna anytime?
cancel.a: tá. You can bainistigh or cealaigh your síntiús from the billeáil page in the app. Changes take effect at the end of your reatha billeáil period.

family.a: teaghlach packs cruthaigh a roinnte sonraí pool across multiple Chatforia accounts. One person pays the bill, and you can tabhair cuireadh or remove baill and set limits per person.

section3.item2: Once you’re signed in, you can nasc additional gléasanna and set up criptithe backups from socruithe in the app.

intro.body: This príobháideachas Policy explains how Chatforia (“we”, “us”) collects, uses, and shares information when you use our apps and services. We design Chatforia to minimize the sonraí we can access.

infoWeCollect.title: Information we collect
infoWeCollect.account: cuntas info (e.g., ríomhphost/phone) to cruthaigh and secure your cuntas.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: criptithe content (teachtaireachtaí/glaonna) is end-to-end criptithe; we can’t read it.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/úsáid like crash logs, gléas type, or coarse analytics to improve performance.

sms.title: Mobile phone numbers and SMS
sms.body: If you roghnaigh to provide a mobile uimhir fóin, we use it to cumasaigh features such as cuntas verification, login alerts, and user-to-user messaging via SMS where supported. We may seol transactional SMS teachtaireachtaí related to your cuntas and activity ar siúl Chatforia. You can opt out of receiving SMS teachtaireachtaí at any time by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (such as “STOP”) or by changing your notification preferences in the app. We do not sell your uimhir fóin or use it for unrelated marketing.
sms.addRecipient: Add a recipient above to tosaigh…

howWeUse.title: How we use information
howWeUse.provide: Provide and secure the service (auth, spam/abuse detection).

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.body: We don’t sell personal sonraí. We may share limited sonraí with processors (e.g., push notifications, analytics) under strict contracts.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: Depending ar siúl your region (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), you may request access, correction, deletion, or opt-out of certain processing. teagmhálaí: príobháideachas@Chatforia.com.

retention.title: sonraí retention & slándáil
retention.body: We retain only what’s needed to operate the service and apply industry-standard slándáil. E2E content can’t be decrypted by us.

children.title: Children
children.body: Chatforia isn’t directed to children under 13 (or as riachtanach by your local law).

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We’ll post updates here and revise the “Last updated” date.

contact.title: Teagmháil
contact.body: príobháideachas@Chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: By using Chatforia you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, don’t use the service.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Provide accurate info and keep credentials secure.
accounts.itemResponsibility: You’re responsible for activity ar siúl your cuntas.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: níl illegal, abusive, or infringing content; níl spam or automated abuse.

sms.title: SMS communications
sms.body: If you provide a mobile uimhir fóin, you agree that Chatforia may seol you SMS teachtaireachtaí related to your cuntas and use of the service, such as login alerts, slándáil notifications, and teachtaireachtaí related to conversations you initiate or participate in. We do not use SMS for promotional or marketing teachtaireachtaí without your explicit consent. Standard teachtaireacht and sonraí rates may apply. You can opt out of SMS teachtaireachtaí at any time by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (for example, “STOP”) or by updating your notification socruithe in the app.

yourContent.title: Your content
yourContent.body: You retain rights to your content. You grant us necessary rights to operate the service (e.g., routing, storage, aistriúchán).

disclaimer.title: Disclaimers & liability
disclaimer.body: Service is provided “as is” without warranties. To the fullest extent permitted by law, Chatforia isn’t liable for indirect or consequential damages.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We may update these terms; continued use after changes means acceptance.

contact.title: Teagmháil
contact.body: tacaíocht@Chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
doNotSell.body: Chatforia does not sell personal information. California residents can still submit requests under CPRA using the button below.

cookies.title: Cookie socruithe
cookies.body: Chatforia uses minimal cookies (e.g., session, slándáil). We don’t use third-party ads cookies. bainistigh cookies via your browser’s socruithe.

press.title: Press
press.contactLine: For media inquiries, reach us at
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia is a príobháideachas-first messaging app that makes cross-teanga chat effortless. teachtaireachtaí are end-to-end criptithe by default, and built-in aistriúchán supports 100+ languages in real time. Users can cumasaigh disappearing teachtaireachtaí, keep read receipts roghnach, and sync across gléasanna. Available ar siúl iOS, Android, and the web.

careers.title: Careers
careers.intro: We’re a small founding team building Chatforia — a príobháideach, global messenger launching ar siúl web, iOS, and Android. If you care about príobháideachas, criptiú, and delightful user experiences, we’d love to hear from you.
careers.openRoles: oscail founding roles: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, slándáil & criptiú Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: How to apply: Use the button below to ríomhphost your resume and links.
careers.whyBullets:
• cabhair build the foundation of a nua global messenger.
• Ship improvements used across web, iOS, and Android.
• Work directly with the founder ar siúl architecture and product direction.
• Own high-impact areas of the stack: messaging, voice, video, criptiú, telecom, AI.
• Join at the beginning — before the user base scales.

about.title: About Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia is a secure, multilingual messenger with end-to-end criptiú, instant aistriúchán, and voice/video calling. Our mission is simple: cabhair people connect—safely, privately, and across languages.
